cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH sedro_woolley_parcels AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.acres, ps.situs_city_state_zip, ps.city_name
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE (LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
    AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
), low_quality_improvements AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number, 'MSL low-quality improvement class' AS match_reasons
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
)
SELECT swp.parcel_number, swp.acres, swp.situs_city_state_zip, swp.city_name, lqi.match_reasons
FROM sedro_woolley_parcels swp
JOIN low_quality_improvements lqi ON swp.parcel_number = lqi.parcel_number
ORDER BY swp.parcel_number
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Parcels with Low Quality Residential Dwellings and 1-3 Acres
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate unincorporated vicinity having low quality residential dwellings (improvement class code 'MSL') and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres

failures.message: SQL did not match required pattern: (quality_codes|match_reasons)
row 1 parcel P37434 did not include low-quality improvement evidence.
row 2 parcel P37479 did not include low-quality improvement evidence.
row 3 parcel P76885 did not include low-quality improvement evidence.

cases.prompt: lots in sedro-woolley or marblemount that are over 1 acre with utilities and no improvements.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.acres, ps.city_name, ps.situs_city_state_zip, TRIM(a."Utilities") AS utilities, ps.improvement_building_count
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') AS a ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
WHERE ps.acres > 1
  AND (LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'marblemount' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%marblemount%')
  AND TRIM(COALESCE(a."Utilities", '')) <> ''
  AND ps.improvement_building_count = 0
cases.title: Lots in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount Over 1 Acre with Utilities and No Improvements
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount with acreage greater than 1, having utilities present, and no improvements recorded.

action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.situs_address, ps.situs_city_state_zip, ps.owner_name, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.improvement_building_count, ps.assessed_value, ps.zoning_code_short, ps.city_name
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND ps.acres > 0
  AND ps.improvement_building_count = 0
  AND ps.land_use IS NOT NULL
  AND (lower(ps.land_use) LIKE '%recreation%' OR lower(ps.land_use) LIKE '%vacant%' OR lower(ps.land_use) LIKE '%open space%')
  AND NOT (ps.land_use LIKE '%(181)%' OR ps.land_use LIKE '%condominium%' OR ps.land_use LIKE '%common area%' OR ps.land_use LIKE '%public%' OR ps.land_use LIKE '%civic%' OR ps.land_use LIKE '%open space%')
  AND ps.has_geometry = TRUE
ORDER BY ps.acres DESC
cases.title: Recreation Lots in Sedro-Woolley
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels in Sedro-Woolley that are recreational land use, excluding mobile home leased property, condominiums, public/civic/open-space parcels, zero-acre or no-geometry parcels, and parcels with residential dwelling evidence.
